rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE SABINA PELTA TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Plaintiff's motion for monetary sanctions -- The court finds that defendant has violated the prior orders of the court issued on April 19, 2004 and August 17, 2004. Failure to obey the previous orders was a misuse of the discovery process. Additional sanctions are awarded in the amount of $862.51, to be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. (610/BCHAN)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ANNE V. MELCHER
rulings.Rulings: THE MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY. (612/Hewlett)

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARY E NAY FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Frank Nay To Produce Documents
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner Mary Hudson's motion to compel Frank Nay to produce documents -- continued to 1/7/05 at 10:30 a.m. per moving party. (610/BCHAN)
